title: AI adoption in early-stage startups
summary: Founders are prioritizing AI tools for operations and customer support with 78% adoption rate in 2024.

title: Remote work trends post-2024
summary: Hybrid work models dominate with 65% of startups adopting flexible working arrangements.

title: Series A funding landscape
summary: Series A average funding increased to $12M with focus on profitability over growth-at-all-costs.

summary: HealthTech market projected to reach $500B by 2025, with telemedicine leading growth.

title: Developer tools market acceleration
summary: DevOps and automation tools market growing 25% YoY as engineering becomes critical startup function.
